title: baliospermum calycinum var. nepalense
intro: Baliospermum calycinum var. nepalense, also known as Bala or Baliospermum, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting digestive health. Baliospermum calycinum var. nepalense can be prepared into herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions.
